description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that runs on push to master and tags matching v*. The workflow has two jobs: test-macos and package-dmg. The test-macos job runs on macos-latest, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, GoogleTest, and other dependencies, builds and tests the project. The package-dmg job depends on test-macos, runs on macos-latest, builds the project, packages a dmg, notarizes it, and uploads it as a release artifact.
